description.value:
As a requirement for casting this jutsu, you must have failed all of your death saving throws, instantly died, or experienced severe emotional turmoil that causes your psyche to break. Your body begins to morph and change into a being much more powerful than your current self—whether or not this was a correct decision is up to you.

You lose yourself, the one thing you said you would never do. You vowed you wouldn't be like them. You lied.

You gain the following effects:

  • Your hit points are restored as if you have taken a full rest.

  • You gain 5 ranks of the Berserk condition. If you or another creature attempts to remove these ranks of Berserk from you, they may only remove 1 rank at a time, and you can only lose Berserk ranks this way once per round. This jutsu ends when you have 0 ranks.

  • Your size becomes Large, and all your Physical Ability Scores are increased by +4.

  • You gain a natural weapon of your choice equal to the damage of your Claymore that has all the same properties.

  • Your movement speed is increased by 60 feet.

At the conclusion of this jutsu, you gain 5 ranks of exhaustion, have your hit points set to 1, and are knocked unconscious for 1 hour.

You may only do this twice before you go too far and may never come back...
